title: neyraudia madagascariensis var. zollingeri
intro: Neyraudia madagascariensis var. zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's Neyraudia or Neyraudia of Zollinger, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Restionaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Neyraudia madagascariensis var. zollingeri include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
